---
title: "Latest outputs"
description: "Latest public outputs from the Barbados National Registry Information Hub."
title-block-style: none

listing:
  - id: latest-outputs
    contents:
      - "../surveillance/cvd/briefings/*.qmd"
      # Add these when the folders and outputs exist:
      # - "../surveillance/hypertension/briefings/*.qmd"
      # - "../surveillance/diabetes/briefings/*.qmd"
      # - "../surveillance/cancer/briefings/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 12
    image-height: "180px"
    date-format: medium
    max-description-length: 180

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    anchor-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    link-external-icon: false
    link-external-newwindow: false
    page-layout: full
---

The latest public outputs from the Barbados National Registry are listed below. These include surveillance briefings, downloadable data packages, and other approved reporting outputs.

Use the search box or category filters to find outputs by topic, condition, or output type.

::: {#latest-outputs}
:::
